summary: iter229 ECW Operations Phase 4 testing complete. 25/26 backend tests passed (1 skipped). All new features verified: Recipe publish (draft→menu_items+menu_components+menu_recipes), Order reconciliation (PO vs Invoice tracking with overdue flags), Predictive invoice mis-code detector (heuristic + Claude), Curated order guides (desktop→mobile), Vendor Reliability Scorecard, Punch-out cXML stub. Frontend mobile ECW verified: Orders drawer has Reconciliation and Vendor Scorecard entries, Reconciliation view shows PO cards with invoice_matched/days_overdue/needs_attention, Scorecards view shows vendor reliability metrics, Order Guide view has curated guide chips, Recipes Drafts view has Publish button for unpublished drafts.

issues: Echo command palette overlay appears on page load - dismisses with Escape key (same as iter228)

test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for backend writes. devAuth=1 query param for frontend auth bypass.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed order guides for testing (TEST_Weekly Seafood, TEST_Update Guide, TEST_Delete Guide). Punchout configs created for testing (vnd-test-*, vnd-enabled-*). inv-miscoded-test was pre-seeded by main agent for scan-coding testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter229 Phase 4 ECW Ops fully tested. Backend: All 14 new endpoints working. POST /echo-chef/drafts/{id}/publish promotes draft to menu_items+menu_components+menu_recipes with item_id+recipe_id returned. GET /reconciliation/open-orders returns POs with invoice_matched/days_overdue/needs_attention flags. GET /reconciliation/missing-by-invoice returns gap items. POST /reconciliation/eom-sweep supports dry_run mode. POST /invoices/{id}/scan-coding detects mis-coded invoices via heuristic (parchment paper on food invoice). POST /invoices/scan-all batch scans unflagged invoices. GET/POST/DELETE /order-guides for curated guides. GET /vendor-scorecards returns reliability metrics. GET/POST /punchout/config for cXML configs (shared_secret REDACTED). POST /punchout/init returns cxml+session_id for enabled vendors. POST /punchout/return accepts arbitrary payload. Frontend: Mobile /m/ecw Orders drawer has Reconciliation and Vendor Scorecard entries. Reconciliation view shows PO cards with vendor, ETA, invoice status, days-late badge, All open/Overdue only toggle. Scorecards view shows vendor cards with reliability score (0-100, color-coded), order_count, total_spend, on_time_rate. Order Guide view has curated guide chips at top. Recipes Drafts view has Publish button for unpublished drafts, published drafts show 'published ✓' status.
